name: specpowers
description: Spec-driven development workflow: structured artifacts, TDD, systematic debugging, and behavioral shaping for AI coding assistants.

interface.shortDescription: Specs, TDD, and workflow discipline for AI coding assistants
interface.longDescription: Use SpecPowers to drive feature work through exploring, proposing, specifying, designing, planning, execution, and archiving with mandatory TDD and review checkpoints.
defaultPrompt: Start with exploring and turn this feature idea into proposal, spec, design, and tasks
Execute the next planned task with TDD and code review discipline
Review this repo and drive the full SpecPowers workflow for a new change
